summary_title_change_2: History is made! {{winner}} takes the gold from {{loser}}.
summary_title_change_3: We have a new champion! {{winner}} dethroned {{loser}} in an epic finish.
summary_title_change_4: The championship changes hands! {{winner}} overcame {{loser}} and is crowned.
summary_title_retain_1: The champion retains! {{champ}} successfully defends their crown.
summary_title_retain_2: Still reigning! {{champ}} overcame the challenge and keeps the title.
summary_title_retain_3: No title change! {{champ}} shows why they are the champion.
summary_title_retain_4: Still at the top! {{champ}} retains the gold after a hard-fought battle.
summary_match_amazing_1: Amazing match! The entire arena gave a standing ovation.
summary_match_amazing_2: Instant classic! 'This is Awesome' chants echoed throughout the building.
summary_match_amazing_3: A masterpiece in the ring! A definitive match of the year candidate.
summary_match_amazing_4: Simply spectacular! Both left their souls out there and the crowd went wild.
summary_match_good_1: Very good match. Solid action and the crowd was into it.
summary_match_good_2: A highly entertaining clash that kept the fans attentive.
summary_match_good_3: Great display of talent. Constant action and a good pace.
summary_match_good_4: High-level bout that left the fans with a great taste in their mouths.
summary_match_decent_1: Decent transition match. Did its job on the card.
summary_match_decent_2: Acceptable bout. Served to cool down the crowd before the main event.
summary_match_decent_3: Average encounter. Had its moments, but nothing spectacular.
summary_match_decent_4: A standard segment with no big surprises. Served its purpose.
summary_match_poor_1: Very weak match. Lack of chemistry and moments that killed the crowd.
summary_match_poor_2: A technical disaster. The audience was incredibly bored.
summary_match_poor_3: Slow pace and several noticeable botches. Fans started to boo.
summary_match_poor_4: Totally forgettable. The action never connected with the audience.
summary_injury_1: ATTENTION! {{wrestler}} has suffered an injury. Out for {{weeks}} weeks.
summary_injury_2: TERRIBLE! {{wrestler}} got hurt. Out of the ring for {{weeks}} weeks.
summary_injury_3: MEDICAL ALERT! {{wrestler}} has been seriously injured and will be absent for {{weeks}} weeks.
summary_injury_4: HEAVY BLOW! The medical team confirms that {{wrestler}} will be sidelined for {{weeks}} weeks.
summary_walkout_1: SCANDAL! Frustrated, {{wrestler}} quits the brand, tearing up their contract.
summary_walkout_2: I QUIT! Tired of the mistreatment, {{wrestler}} packed their bags and left the building.
summary_walkout_3: TENSION EXPLODES! {{wrestler}} has decided to leave the company due to low morale.
summary_walkout_4: WALKOUT! Negotiations collapsed and {{wrestler}} has abandoned the promotion.
summary_promo_turn_surprise_1: UNEXPECTED TWIST! After this explosive promo, they revealed their true intentions and switched sides.
summary_promo_turn_surprise_2: BETRAYAL! Nobody saw it coming. The masks have come off and the landscape has completely changed.
summary_promo_turn_surprise_3: SHOCKING! A radical change in attitude that leaves the entire Universe in shock.
summary_promo_turn_surprise_4: THE TABLES HAVE TURNED! A declaration that breaks alliances and changes their stance with the audience.
summary_promo_turn_good_1: The crowd reacted strongly to the change in attitude.
summary_promo_turn_good_2: The stands went crazy with this new facet, completely buying into the idea.
summary_promo_turn_good_3: Perfect execution. Fans absorbed every word of this new persona.
summary_promo_turn_good_4: Nuclear reaction from the crowd to this new character direction.
summary_promo_turn_bad_1: Although there was surprise, the execution of the turn was a bit confusing.
summary_promo_turn_bad_2: The attempt to switch sides left fans scratching their heads instead of reacting.
summary_promo_turn_bad_3: Unconvincing. The turn felt forced and the crowd barely reacted.
summary_promo_turn_bad_4: Awkward silence. The audience didn't quite understand the story twist.
summary_promo_amazing_1: Fantastic promo. Completely ignited the stands and built up the hype.
summary_promo_amazing_2: Pure magic on the mic! Every word connected and the arena vibrated with this segment.
summary_promo_amazing_3: A masterclass in crowd control. One of the best promos of the year.
summary_promo_amazing_4: Absolute fire on the mic! The atmosphere is electric for what comes next.
summary_promo_good_1: Good mic segment. Did its job of moving the story forward.
summary_promo_good_2: Solid, straight-to-the-point words that kept the audience's interest.
summary_promo_good_3: A very effective promo that managed to get the message across clearly.
summary_promo_good_4: Great verbal intensity that helped heat things up for the future.
summary_promo_poor_1: Somewhat cold and boring promo. The crowd used it as a bathroom break.
summary_promo_poor_2: A tense segment where lines were forgotten; the arena fell into dead silence.
summary_promo_poor_3: Repetitive and sparkless speech. People struggled to stay awake.
summary_promo_poor_4: Lacked intensity and the message felt heavily scripted. The crowd didn't react.
summary_title_vacated_1: CHAMPIONSHIP VACATED: Due to inactivity time, management has stripped the title.
summary_title_vacated_2: STRIPPED OF THE TITLE! The injury is too severe and the championship is vacated by direct order.
summary_title_vacated_3: FORCED TO RELINQUISH! The severity of the injury forces the championship to be declared vacant.
summary_title_vacated_4: OFFICIAL DECISION! Unable to defend it, the committee has left the championship without an owner.
